code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut p = 0
  mut n = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let tok = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end
    let num = match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if num > 0
      p = p + num
    else if num < 0
      n = n + num
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  let r = p - n
  println("r=#{r}")
  Ok(())
end
